executive_summary: The Módulo Seguridad implementation has completed most backend and frontend requirements but is missing critical test files. Backend entities, use cases, controllers, and routes are implemented correctly for Maestros, Ciudades, and Seguridad Dashboard. Frontend pages and components are present with proper CRUD functionality and SlidePanel patterns. However, the required feature tests for MaestroControllerTest and SecurityDashboardTest are missing, which blocks verification of business logic correctness.
CRITICAL_issues: Missing tests/Feature/API/MaestroControllerTest.php - required by task A13 to verify full CRUD functionality with validation and error scenarios
Missing tests/Feature/API/SecurityDashboardTest.php - required by task C4 to verify KPI calculations and authentication/authorization
WARNING_issues: MaestroRequest.php allows PUT/PATCH but spec only mentions PUT - minor inconsistency
Some API response handling in frontend assumes nested data structure that may not match actual backend responses
MaestroRepositoryInterface.paginate() method signature includes optional $sortBy and $sortOrder parameters not specified in spec
SUGGESTION_issues: Consider adding more specific error messages in MaestroRequest for better UX
Add pagination controls to MaestrosPage grouped view for consistency with other pages
Implement loading skeletons in MaestroForm for better user experience during mutations
next_recommended: Create the missing test files following the pattern of existing tests (like ProductoControllerTest.php), then run php artisan test to verify all tests pass before proceeding to archive.
